pi_items.source: Verified against the Python `holidays` library for US Federal Holidays 2025. The IDs and dates accurately reflect the real-world 2025 dates and correspond explicitly to the task prompt requirements.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring 11 US Federal Holidays for the year 2025. The holiday dates and names specified in the task metadata have been independently verified against standard US calendar rules for 2025 (e.g., MLK Day on 2025-01-20, Memorial Day on 2025-05-26, Thanksgiving on 2025-11-27) and perfectly match the real-world schedule. The holiday IDs are specific string identifiers required by the task prompt.
